     The Numbers Business Report

Blink Twice (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,093,906Details
International Box Office $25,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $48,093,906
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $39,383
Total $39,383
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When tech billionaire Slater King meets cocktail waitress Frida at his fundraising gala, sparks fly. He invites her to join him and his friends on a dream vacation on his private island. It’s paradise. Wild nights blend into sun soaked days and everyone's having a great time. No one wants this trip to end, but as strange things start to happen, Frida begins to question her reality. There is something wrong with this place. She’ll have to uncover the truth if she wants to make it out of this party alive.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,301,894 (31.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.16 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,067 opening theaters/3,067 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $24,421,148

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 23rd, 2024 (Wide) by Amazon MGM Studios
International Releases: August 21st, 2024 (Wide) (France)
August 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
August 22nd, 2024 (Wide), released as Um Sinal Secreto (Portugal)
August 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (Switzerland)
August 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (Thailand)
Video Release: September 17th, 2024 by Amazon Studios
MPA Rating: R for strong violent content, sexual assault, drug use and language throughout, and some sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2833 (cert #54547), 5/8/2024)
Running Time: 102 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Actors Making Their Directorial Debut, Ensemble
Filming location (country): Mexico
Plot point: Faulty Memory, Rape Revenge, Sex Crimes, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: This Is Important, Free Association, Bold Choices, Amazon MGM Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When tech billionaire Slater King meets cocktail waitress Frida at his fundraising gala, sparks fly. He invites her to join him and his friends on a dream vacation on his private island. It’s paradise. Wild nights blend into sun soaked days and everyone's having a great time. No one wants this trip to end, but as strange things start to happen, Frida begins to question her reality. There is something wrong with this place. She’ll have to uncover the truth if she wants to make it out of this party alive.
